name: ripvec
description: Semantic code search + multi-language LSP + knowledge-graph skill index. 21 grammars, 26 extensions, function-level PageRank, hybrid BM25+vector ranking. Model2Vec static encoder + TinyBERT cross-encoder reranker, CPU-only. 4.1.15: trim intent-routing skill description under Codex's 1024-char loader limit (was 1047, now 900); orientation-grouped triggers preserved. 4.1.14: up_to_date MCP tool rebuilt for plugin-install users — release_stale + upgrade_hint via GitHub Releases API. 4.1.13: MCP project-root default honors CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR. 4.1.12: focus-PageRank recalibrated (α 0.15 → 0.35). 4.1.10: knowledge-graph skill index. 4.1.0: find_dead_code MCP tool. 4.0: LSP-shaped composability.
